reviews.review_description: Very cool game with lovely graphics and fantastic sound design! Only one negative experience: It took me way to long to find the exit menu (like searching in the book etc) and then the switch to the touchpad was also a little bit confusing for me (maybe im just a bit silly :D idk) but all in all cool game
This is a fun game, but the license should be earned not bought. Also, there should be a help button that offers a tutorial for whatever you're doing.
This game is awesome i have played many hours and am addicted. But how do i get more food for my pets?

There are no colors in the crystal shop tab to make a creature white. A ordee calls for a creature to be ghostly white and i don't have the colors to do so, i dont know how to complete these orders  if someone knows anything, please help. Over all great and fun game.

developer_response.body:
If you don’t add any color crystals it makes your potions white. There’s a tip in the book explaining this:

Potions and Colorpops can be colored by adding a Crystal to your brew. Crystals instantly dissolve and take effect in the cauldron. When no Crystal is used the Potion or Colorpop will become white.

reviews.review_title: Super fun game, worth paying for!
reviews.review_description: I play this game every day, not religiously, but it’s become a warming presence to my daily routine and is a lovely escape to a whimsical sort of world. I’m usually loathe to spend money on free games but the devs deserved it here, £5 for a wonderful ongoing experience and addition to my gaming routine is a small price to pay!

After shooting zombies, being chased by evil people or frightened by creepy things.. it’s really nice to unwind with a relaxing app like Pet Lab.  You get to create and train “pets” (who will interact with you if you rub their tummies)!  This app is creative, the graphics are cute and it puts a smile on my face! I highly recommend it!

1/26/19:
I still really enjoy the game and have even paid for the license to unlock all the coins but cannot find how to buy more FOOD.  Without being able to feed the creatures I can’t progress to their completion.  I have the coins I just don’t see the option to buy food.  Please advise ASAP as I have a hungry creature hanging in limbo!  
Also is there a way to buy additional eggs of various types? Thanks
I purchased the game and it doesn't work now it keeps saying error lost connection. Not worth the 7.99$. Just keep.playing for free don't waste ur money. On the full guild license.

developer_response.body:
Good news! Pet Lab purchases are verified fixed by Oculus.  
Thank you for your support (and patience)

reviews.review_description: I can't purchase my pet license please help it always says error

developer_response.body: redzen15, We saw your email to support.  Thank you for bringing this to our attention.  We are trying to find out what is happening in the Oculus Store.  If you would like to ask them directly, please send them an email as well.  https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_title: Great game but routinely crashes on me
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this game.  I purchased the license and ever since I leveled up past level 6 the game is always crashing on me.  It is frustrating because I start to build the monster and I end up losing things.  Sometimes I get it back once I restart but there have been times I lost the stuff.  As stated this game is really fun it the constant crashing is really getting frustrating.  I stopped playing the game until I can get the game from crashing.  Please help.

developer_response.body: Hi DaBears345474, sorry to hear about the issue. Can you please reach out to gamesupport@forcefieldxr.com with additional information, such as: what device on you using? If it's a phone, what OS is it running on? Have you tried uninstalling, then reinstalling the game? We want to help you resolve the issue. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Had some trouble with it at first, but found out it was on my end. I really love how this game is, and how it looks is amazing! I'm so happy that I can now properly play this amazing game that has alot of interesting mechanics that I love in games! Also sorry for the bad review at first was just stressed on why it didn't install properly before.

developer_response.body: Hi Devintherealist, sorry to hear about the issue. Can you please reach out to gamesupport@forcefieldxr.com with more information, such as: which device are you playing on? Does it only happen to this app or also other Oculus apps? Do you have enough space on your device and is your internet connection stable? We want to help you resolve this issue. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this game. It’s fun and easy to learn. I feel like the hammer is funny, and don’t think children would think it’s okay to abuse real animals from using the hammer in this game.

The actual game is awesome! I love being able to creat monsters, but there is an issue. After the tutorial the game gives limited resources and after you eventually run out you have to buy more with the  coins you eat after completing an order. Also, when you don’t have enough or there’s this sign on an item apparently you have to buy an $8 license in the game to be able to get the rest of your resources. This is a big problem since I personally do not want to spend eight dollars for a fake license it’s to continue playing the game. And it’d also be great if during the tutorial when we’re asked to make a monster on our own, if we don’t understand what to do after maybe 3 minutes it’d be wonderful for the narrator/scroll to give you some hints. Otherwise, I really do enjoy the game! Nice work, creators.

developer_response.body: We are happy to know that you enjoy the game and we hear your feedback, thank you.

reviews.review_title: Love the game need helo sometimes
reviews.review_description: Sometimes ill try to google for help other people will get on and post on there but sometimes i cant get the answer to certain things is there like a manual or guide book i can get
It's an amazing game but unfortunately I cant see any pet colours, they are all black :(

developer_response.body: The fix to this issue is now available as an update in the Oculus Store.  You can contact us at support@forcefieldxr.com if you have any questions.

reviews.review_description: I ran out of treats and I don't know what to do now.. Everyone complains about similar problems so Devs should do something about it.
I absolutely love this game

reviews.review_title: Not the best, but not the worst
reviews.review_description: In the beginning the princip of the game is making fun and I enjoyd creating the creatures. But after 60 minutes you´ve seen everything and the princip is starting getting bored. Also it´s nearly impossible to continue the game without spending money.
im stuck—help me figure out how to get more magic lollipops
I can't see the creature's color.... every creature have black color I so upset my device is galaxy s10

developer_response.body: The fix to this issue is now available as an update in the Oculus Store.  You can contact us at support@forcefieldxr.com if you have any questions.

reviews.review_description:
This game is my first VR game when I first bought it. It’s really cute and enjoyable game. It’s good to know that I’m still a kid at heart! I would have given this five stars. The only thing that this lose a star is because I wished that there will be a captioned/subtitle for what the narrator says. This will be huge beneficial for the Deaf and Hard of Hearing community. It would have been highlighted of my life when I play with VR. If you provide subtitles for the narrator, I would definitely coming back and change this to five stars and recommend to all of my friends to get this game for real!!

UPDATE 8/12/2019:: I am so sad to return my Oculus Go, but getting the upgrade one!! I’m sad that this doesn’t go with Quest!! Can you make it happen?!? Along with subtitles??? Pretty please?!
